textByHash.bf0444bbb39ed2ddedfd70ccc8e679670fbebb50: How do. You planning on crossing this here bridge and heading up to Rellekka then?
textByHash.e09d43f6e2c63db4a82ed88488f3b6e55b82b023: Aye, 'tis a good thing we fixed this 'ere bridge, I reckon. You best be careful up there. Them Fremenniks are odd 'uns.
textByHash.3bdf6e0ecf3b91b2b8cd8bbd5709811ecbe775f4: Aye, that I did. 'Twas real thirsty work too. If only some kind stranger would buy us a bit of beer to sup, eh?
textByHash.4f140c856deefec24c1456e989c6f759c1d1e2b5: What with that inn at seers so close by and all, eh?
textByHash.01393b2d99b2c99088797ece33c5479d15693353: Just make sure yer don't get me none of that non alcoholic rubbish from that poison salesman guy at the tavern!
textByHash.b2f57e5f6c2c57ae2fbf9aa5d12ae742b5a4d685: Aye, that's what I told t'gaffer. Nobody wants to go up and hang out with a buncha dumb barbarians when there's a perfectly good inn to sup in, in t'seers village.
textByHash.e33e6005789eaf88efba2d8dca8703ab78f9aff2: Ain't much better in life than having a nice cold beer to sup on a hot day like this, eh? Better'n fixing bridges, eh?
textByHash.88d49c64852530979af6c6b62488690bcf76f3a6: Ta very much, like. That'll hit the spot nicely. Here, you can have this. I picked it up as a souvenir on me last hols.
textByHash.bfd6175158b2783b8708a11914e252e010395b8d: I dunno rightly, but if you use a tinderbox on it, it don't half make a loud noise!
textByHash.66d08f99ca9f69144d93e4e0e43e6a6d9601798a: A bit early in the day fer that ain't it?
textByHash.d5ebb663230889511b2800157d9ff84adb01aa8a: No ta, not my brand of beer.
textByHash.e3aac99c5d994ba5d7a2124a6881e03f63dca898: No ta, not a big wine fan, me.
